name: Crockpot Chicken Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Cream of Mushroom Soup (or any cream soup)
1 Package Lipton's Dry Onion Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the crockpot.
2. Cook on low for 4 to 6 hours, or until the chicken is tender.
3. Serve over cooked noodles or rice.
